metadata.name: ww-map
metadata.description: An interactive Google Maps element with configurable map type, styles, controls, markers, marker tooltips, and map or marker events.
features: Roadmap, satellite, hybrid, and terrain map types
Built-in Google map style presets and custom JSON styles
Custom marker icons with optional fixed dimensions
Marker tooltip display on hover or click
Automatic bounds fitting around multiple markers
Map click and marker mouse/click events

properties.name: defaultMapType
properties.description: Google map type to display.

properties.name: mapStyle
properties.description: Visual style preset for non-satellite maps. Ignored when defaultMapType is satellite.

properties.name: markersIcon
properties.description: Whether markers should use custom icon images instead of the default Google marker.

properties.name: markersAutoSize
properties.description: Whether custom marker icons should keep their natural image size. Only used when markersIcon is true.

properties.name: defaultMarkerUrl
properties.description: Fallback custom marker icon URL. Used when markersIcon is true and an individual marker does not provide its own icon URL.

properties.name: defaultMarkerWidth
properties.description: Fallback custom marker icon width in pixels when markersIcon is true and markersAutoSize is false.

properties.name: defaultMarkerHeight
properties.description: Fallback custom marker icon height in pixels when markersIcon is true and markersAutoSize is false.

properties.name: mapStyleJSON
properties.description: Custom Google Maps style object with a code field containing JSON. Only used when mapStyle is custom and defaultMapType is not satellite.

properties.name: googleKey
properties.description: Google Maps JavaScript API key. The map shows a placeholder until a valid key matching the Google API key format is provided.

properties.name: lat
properties.description: Initial center latitude as a string.

properties.name: lng
properties.description: Initial center longitude as a string.

properties.name: zoom
properties.description: Initial Google Maps zoom level from 0 to 20.

properties.name: markers
properties.description: Array of marker objects. By default each marker should expose name, lat, and lng fields; when custom icons are enabled, url, width, and height can also be used.

properties.name: nameField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker tooltip content when markers are bound from custom data. Defaults to name when empty.

properties.name: latField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker latitude when markers are bound from custom data. Defaults to lat when empty.

properties.name: lngField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker longitude when markers are bound from custom data. Defaults to lng when empty.

properties.name: urlField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker icon URL when markers are bound from custom data and markersIcon is true. Defaults to url when empty.

properties.name: widthField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker icon width when markers are bound from custom data, markersIcon is true, and markersAutoSize is false. Defaults to width when empty.

properties.name: heightField
properties.description: Object property path used as marker icon height when markers are bound from custom data, markersIcon is true, and markersAutoSize is false. Defaults to height when empty.

properties.name: markerTooltipTrigger
properties.description: How marker tooltips are opened. Use null to disable marker tooltips.

properties.name: fixedBounds
properties.description: Whether the map should automatically fit its viewport around all markers when at least two markers exist.

properties.name: zoomControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps zoom control.

properties.name: scaleControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps scale control.

properties.name: rotateControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps rotate control.

properties.name: streetViewControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps Street View control.

properties.name: fullscreenControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps fullscreen control.

properties.name: mapTypeControl
properties.description: Whether to show the Google Maps map type control.

events.name: map:click
events.description: Triggered when the user clicks the map.

events.name: marker:mouseover
events.description: Triggered when the mouse enters a marker.

events.name: marker:mouseout
events.description: Triggered when the mouse leaves a marker.

events.name: marker:click
events.description: Triggered when the user clicks a marker.

specifications: This element renders as a single standalone tag and has no slots or child elements.
A valid Google Maps JavaScript API key is required for the actual map to render; without it, the component displays its built-in API key placeholder.
Use lat and lng as strings for the map center because the component parses them with parseFloat.
Marker objects should contain numeric lat and lng values, plus a name string when marker tooltips are needed.
When binding markers from data with different field names, set nameField, latField, lngField, urlField, widthField, or heightField to the matching object property paths.
Set fixedBounds to true when displaying multiple markers so the map fits all marker positions; set it to false when the chosen center and zoom must be preserved.
Only use mapStyleJSON when mapStyle is custom. Its value must be an object with a code string containing valid JSON accepted by the Google Maps styles option.
Do not set mapStyle when defaultMapType is satellite; the component clears mapStyle for satellite maps.
Use markerTooltipTrigger null when markers should not show info windows, hover for desktop-oriented hover tooltips, and click for mobile-friendly tooltips.
